reversal.name: Double Top
reversal.description: Two peaks at similar level followed by breakdown

reversal.name: Double Bottom
reversal.description: Two troughs at similar level followed by breakout

reversal.name: Head and Shoulders
reversal.description: Left shoulder, head, right shoulder - bearish reversal

reversal.name: Cup and Handle
reversal.description: U-shaped cup followed by small consolidation handle

reversal.name: Island Reversal
reversal.description: Isolated price action with gaps on both sides

continuation.name: Bull Flag
continuation.description: Upward pole followed by downward sloping consolidation

continuation.name: Bear Flag
continuation.description: Downward pole followed by upward sloping consolidation

continuation.name: Ascending Triangle
continuation.description: Flat top, rising bottom - typically bullish

continuation.name: Descending Triangle
continuation.description: Flat bottom, falling top - typically bearish

continuation.name: Symmetrical Triangle
continuation.description: Converging trendlines - breaks in direction of prior trend

harmonic.name: Three Drives
harmonic.description: Three impulsive drives with Fib extensions

candlestick.name: Bullish Engulfing
candlestick.description: Large bull candle engulfs prior bear candle

candlestick.name: Bearish Engulfing
candlestick.description: Large bear candle engulfs prior bull candle

candlestick.name: Hammer
candlestick.description: Long lower wick, small body at top

candlestick.name: Inverted Hammer
candlestick.description: Long upper wick, small body at bottom

candlestick.name: Shooting Star
candlestick.description: Long upper wick, small body at bottom - at top

candlestick.name: Hanging Man
candlestick.description: Hammer shape at top of uptrend

candlestick.name: Inside Bar
candlestick.description: Current candle inside prior candle range

candlestick.name: Outside Bar
candlestick.description: Current candle engulfs prior candle range

complex.name: Diamond Top
complex.description: Expanding then contracting formation at top

complex.name: Diamond Bottom
complex.description: Expanding then contracting formation at bottom

sweeps.label: BSL Sweep
sweeps.description: Swept BSL at 90420.0, rejected back below

sweeps.label: SSL Sweep
sweeps.description: Swept SSL at 1925.0, rejected back above
